goal: Build rhinobase (Rhino modeling) + iboisbase (IBOIS timber craft) — two new knowledge bases alongside archibase
priority: nice-to-have for midterm, core work post-midterm
scalability_rule: Promote to a base only when LEARNINGS.md for that domain gets too long. Don't create bases speculatively.

phases.name: rhinobase — RhinoCommon Knowledge
phases.notes: API docs (L1) + developer guides (L2) + forum idioms (L4). Can drop forum agent if budget tight.

phases.name: iboisbase — IBOIS Extraction
phases.notes: 4 repos + README-only docs. compas_wood is bottleneck.

phases.name: Integration
phases.notes: L3 scripts grounded in both bases. New MCP tools. Cross-tool guide. CSVs.

phases.name: Roundwood Loop
phases.notes: Incorporate Damien's feedback. Build end-to-end design loop.

minimum_viable_run: RhinoCommon API (Agent F) + compas_wood (Agent A) + 2-3 L3 scripts = 3 agents, ~3 hrs
